etymology.description: 玉(玉) (yù, "jade") + 玉(玉) (yù, "jade") = two jade pieces combined -> concept of a pair of jades
etymology.interpretation: The character 珏 is an ideogrammic compound that represents two jade pieces together, symbolizing their combination. This merging of two jade symbols emphasizes the idea of pairing or duality in jade.

examples.chinese: 他收藏了两块珍贵的玉珏(他收藏了兩塊珍貴的玉珏)。
examples.pinyin: Tā shōucángle liǎng kuài zhēnguì de yù jué.
examples.english: He collected two precious pieces of jade.

examples.chinese: 这些珏曾属于皇室收藏(這些珏曾屬於皇室收藏)。
examples.pinyin: Zhèxiē jué céng shǔyú huángshì shōucáng.
examples.english: These pieces of jade were once part of the royal collection.

examples.chinese: 专家正在研究这两块珏的历史来源(專家正在研究這兩塊珏的歷史來源)。
examples.pinyin: Zhuānjiā zhèngzài yánjiū zhè liǎng kuài jué de lìshǐ láiyuán.
examples.english: Experts are studying the historical origin of these two pieces of jade.
